_doc: Performance budgets for Travel Dreams. Future Lighthouse CI / bundle-size gates should fail PRs that exceed these. Update intentionally — never relax silently.

LCP.note: Largest Contentful Paint — measured on simulated 4G throttle

INP.note: Interaction to Next Paint — replaced FID in 2024

TBT.note: Total Blocking Time during page load

/library.note: Heavy: virtualized place grid + filters + cover images

/collections/[id].note: Includes mapbox-gl chunk for collection map view

publicAssetsKb.note: Source images in public/ should be ≤300 KB. 21 PNGs currently exceed this (1.0–1.3 MB landing destination images) — flag for compression task.

enforcement.current: manual — re-run `npm run build` and diff against this file
enforcement.future: Lighthouse CI in GitHub Actions + bundle-size gate on PRs (tracked: design /perf-audit skill)
